channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Stanford says player is responsive after leaving game vs. SMU in an ambulance
item.description: Stanford cornerback Aaron Morris was alert and responsive after being immobilized and taken off the field in an ambulance following a tackle, the school said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Wilson scores 31 and Aces win 3rd WNBA title in 4 seasons, beating Mercury 97-86 for 4-game sweep
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — A'ja Wilson put in work in the paint, getting bucket after bucket despite multiple defenders draped all over her. She got plenty of help from Chelsea Gray, Jewell Loyd and Dana Evans. The trio started raining 3s early in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A'ja Wilson makes unprecedented history as Aces win third WNBA championship in 4 years
item.description: A'ja Wilson became the first player in WNBA history to win the regular-season MVP, Defensive Player of the Year and Finals MVP in the same season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch the 49ers vs. the Buccaneers on Sunday
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers battle the Tampa Bay Buccaneers on Sunday, Oct. 12 at 1:25 p.m. PDT at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Polanco hits winning single in the 15th inning as the Mariners beat the Tigers to advance to ALCS
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Jorge Polanco hit a game-ending single in the 15th inning, and the Seattle Mariners advanced to the AL Championship Series by outlasting the Detroit Tigers for a 3-2 victory Friday night in the longest winner-take-all postseason game in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: LUKE OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tarik Skubal turns in a dominant performance in Detroit's Game 5 loss to Mariners
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Tarik Skubal was terrific. And he was long gone when the season ended for the Detroit Tigers. Skubal struck out 13 in six dominant innings in Game 5 of the AL Division Series at Seattle on Friday night. But the Tigers were eliminated when Jorge Polanco singled home J.P.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Watch every touchdown in the battle of unbeatens as Carlsbad takes on Mission Hills
item.description: Carlsbad Lancers defeated Mission Hills Grizzlies 31-17 in a battle of two undefeated teams, with Eli MacNeal throwing four touchdowns and Darian Webb gaining huge chunks of yardage in the fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: No. 24 South Florida scores 4 TDs in a 3 1/2-minute span and hands North Texas its 1st loss
item.description: DENTON, Texas (AP) — Byrum Brown threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores, Jhalyn Shuler returned a fumble 34 yards for South Florida's fourth TD in span of 3 1/2 minutes and the No. 24 Bulls beat North Texas 63-36 on Friday night, handing the Mean Green their first loss this season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts ejected from WNBA Finals Game 4 after heated argument
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts was ejected from Game 4 of the WNBA Finals after receiving two quick technical fouls in the third quarter against the Las Vegas Aces on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT and DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WWE’s #DIY joins The Finish to talk San Jose Sharks and who’s tougher
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- The San Jose Sharks are partnering with World Wrestling Entertainment to host their first-ever WWE-themed game at the SAP Center in San Jose on Saturday, Oct. 11.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, KRON4

item.title: Mark Sanchez seen bloody, wounded in surveillance video after stabbing
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez was seen bloody and wounded in new surveillance video obtained by TMZ.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Charles Barkley issues warning to WNBA players amid contentious CBA negotiations
item.description: NBA legend Charles Barkley warned WNBA players about overplaying their hand while they go up against billionaires in labor negotiations this fall.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James teased 'the decision of all decisions' announcement. It was an ad
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James had another “decision” to announce. Turns out, it was an ad. The Los Angeles Lakers star teased that he would have something to say Tuesday. The “decision” reference is a nod to how he announced in July 2010 that he was joining the Miami Heat.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cubs manager Craig Counsell trying to win playoff series against former franchise, once his hometown team
item.description: MILWAUKEE — One of the many storylines during this National League Division Series between the Chicago Cubs and the Milwaukee Brewers is Craig Counsell, the former Brewers skipper — and that franchise's all-time winningest manager — who left Milwaukee in November 2023 to lead the Cubs.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lowe, WGN 9

item.title: Steven Fisk birdies his last 3 holes in Mississippi to win first PGA Tour title
item.description: Steven Fisk said he wasn't going to let anything get in the way of his first PGA Tour victory, and it took birdies on his last three holes Sunday to close with an 8-under 64 to win the Sanderson Farms Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers' Christian McCaffrey call San Francisco 'San Fran' in new commercial
item.description: (KRON) — 49ers running back and former Stanford University standout Christian McCaffrey committed a Bay Area cultural faux pas in a new Lowe’s ad posted to social media on Oct. 1. “What’s up, San Fran?” Christian McCaffrey says in the advertisement.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, KRON4

item.title: It’s a boy! Phillies star Bryce Harper announces birth of fourth child ahead of NLDS opener
item.description: Phillies slugger Bryce Harper added to his family lineup when he and his wife, Kayla, welcomed the birth of their fourth child days ahead of Saturday's playoff opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cubs drop NLDS Game 1 to Brewers 9-3
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP/WGN) - The Chicago Cubs lost Game 1 of the NLDS to the Milwaukee Brewers Saturday afternoon at American Family Field by a score of 9-3. Jackson Chourio went 3 for 3 and drove in three runs in the first two innings before departing with a hamstring injury.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9
